positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a floating jellyfish nebula, rendered in negative space style. The jellyfish should have elegant, flowing tendrils and bioluminescent internal structures, set against a deep, cosmic midnight blue and rich indigo background. Accompanying the nebula are abstract, stylized mountain peaks and scattered constellations represented by glowing gold lines. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, crisp outlines suitable for screen printing. Use high contrast, vibrant jewel tones, and an ethereal glow effect. Digital painting, modern geometric aesthetic, vector art feel, art nouveau influence.
